title: PUBLIC & ODVA TRANSPORTATION PROGRAMS - 211info
text: INNER COURT FAMILY CENTER PUBLIC & ODVA TRANSPORTATION PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Public transit program provides rides for everyone and also offers rides through the Oregon Department of Veterans Affairs (ODVA). 705 Chewaucan Street Paisley, OR 97636 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 407-0317 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 407-0317 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule a ride; may need to leave a message. Three-day advance notice is preferred, but will work to provide a ride at any time. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Disability Related Transportation Senior Ride Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - PAISLEY/SUMMER LAKE FOOD SHARE PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. INNER COURT FAMILY CENTER
